popularStory.headline: Mathilde Matilda "Maud" De Montgomery-Find-a-grave
popularStory.description:
Daughter of Roger de Montgomery, the 1st Earl of Shrewsbury and Mabel de Talvas. She was the first wife of Robert de Mortain, the Earl of Cornwall, mother of: 
* William, Count of Mortain
* Agnes, wif …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Montgomery於1039年之前出生時，她的父親Roger de Montgomery16歲，母親Mabel Talvas13歲。她於1058年與Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1085年在法國巴-諾門迪曼其莫當，埋葬在法國諾門迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Montgomery was born before 1039, her father, Roger de Montgomery, was 16 and her mother, Mabel Talvas, was 13. She married Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain in 1058, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1085, in Mortain, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, and was buried in Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Montgomery est née avant 1039, son père, Roger de Montgomery, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Mabel Talvas, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain en 1058, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1085, à Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, et a été enterrée à Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Montgomery vor 1039 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Montgomery 16 und ihre Mutter Mabel Talvas 13. Sie hat 1058 in Frankreich Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1085 in Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Montgomery è nata il prima del 1039, sua padre, Roger de Montgomery, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Mabel Talvas, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain nel 1058, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1085, nel Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, e fu sepolta a Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Montgomeryが1039年以前に生まれた時，父Roger de Montgomeryは16歳，母Mabel Talvasは13歳であった。1058年にフランスでRobert de Conteville Count of Mortainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1085年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェモーティインで死去し，フランスノーマンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Montgomery(이)가 1039년 이전에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Montgomery(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Talvas(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1058년 프랑스에서 Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1085년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 모르테인에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디에 묻혔다.

mn.Cardinham, Cornwall, England: Kardhinan, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Montgomery nasceu antes 1039, seu pai, Roger de Montgomery, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Talvas, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain em 1058, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1085, em Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, e foi sepultada em Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Montgomery родилась перед 1039 г., её отцу по имени Roger de Montgomery было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Talvas, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain в 1058 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1085 г. в местности мортеин, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция и была похоронена в местности норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Montgomery nació antes de 1039, su papá, Roger de Montgomery, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Mabel Talvas, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain en 1058, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1085, en Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, y fue sepultada en Normandie, Francia.
